scenarios.description: Getter returns the default OutputSettings instance without mutation
scenarios.precondition: Document doc = new Document("http://example.com"); // default outputSettings initialized
scenarios.expectedResult: returned instance is the same as doc.outputSettings field and is non-null

scenarios.description: Setter with non-null OutputSettings updates field and returns this Document
scenarios.precondition: Document doc = new Document("base"); OutputSettings newSettings = new OutputSettings().prettyPrint(false);
scenarios.expectedResult: returned Document is same instance as doc and doc.outputSettings() == newSettings
pseudocode: TEST TC02 setter non-null updates outputSettings

scenarios.description: Setter throws IllegalArgumentException when passed null OutputSettings
scenarios.precondition: Document doc = new Document("base"); // Validate.notNull enforces non-null
